getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.summary: Learn the easiest way to start using TradeCRM Pro.

steps.title: Choose your language
steps.body: Use the language switcher on the login page or top bar to select English or Hindi.

steps.title: Sign in
steps.body: Enter your email and password. Demo users can open the demo access section on the login page.

steps.title: Check the dashboard
steps.body: Start from the dashboard to see sales, purchases, stock, payments, and profit.

steps.title: Use quick actions
steps.body: Click the quick cards for common tasks like purchase, payment, reports, or help.

steps.title: Open Help anytime
steps.body: Use the Help button at the bottom-right when you are unsure what to do next.

login-profile.title: Login & Profile
login-profile.summary: Sign in safely and manage your password.

steps.title: Open the login page
steps.body: Go to the application address and select your preferred language.

steps.title: Enter login details
steps.body: Use the email and password given by your admin.

steps.title: Open your profile menu
steps.body: Click the circle with your initial in the top-right corner.

steps.title: Change password
steps.body: Choose Change Password, enter your old password, and save the new one.

steps.title: Logout after work
steps.body: Use Logout from the same profile menu when finished.

master-data.title: Adding Master Data
master-data.summary: Create customers, suppliers, partners, products, and setup lists.

steps.title: Open People & Products
steps.body: Use the sidebar section for customers, suppliers, products, and master data.

steps.title: Click Add New
steps.body: Add one record at a time using simple forms.

steps.title: Fill required details
steps.body: Enter name, phone, GSTIN, SKU, or tax values depending on the list.

steps.title: Save
steps.body: Click Save. The new item is immediately available in daily work screens.

steps.title: Edit when needed
steps.body: Use the edit icon in the table to correct details later.

purchases.title: Recording Purchases
purchases.summary: Track what you buy and confirm it into stock.

steps.title: Open Purchases
steps.body: Go to Daily Work and select Purchases.

steps.title: Create a purchase
steps.body: Click New Purchase and add supplier, date, product, quantity, rate, GST, and freight.

steps.title: Review the amount
steps.body: Check the calculated total before confirming.

steps.title: Confirm draft purchases
steps.body: Use the confirm button so inventory stock is updated.

steps.title: Search old purchases
steps.body: Use the search box to find bills by number or supplier.

sales.title: Recording Sales
sales.summary: Record customer sales and track profit.

steps.title: Open Sales
steps.body: Go to Daily Work and select Sales.

steps.title: Create a sale
steps.body: Click New Sale and choose the customer and product.

steps.title: Enter quantity and price
steps.body: Fill quantity, rate, GST, and other charges.

steps.title: Save the sale
steps.body: The system calculates amount and profit for reporting.

steps.title: Review sales history
steps.body: Use the table to search and edit sales records.

inventory.title: Inventory & Stock
inventory.summary: See stock value, batches, and movement history.

steps.title: Open Inventory
steps.body: Go to Daily Work and select Inventory.

steps.title: Check stock value
steps.body: The top cards show total stock value, product lines, and batches.

steps.title: View current stock
steps.body: The Current Stock tab shows product quantity, weight, and value.

steps.title: View movements
steps.body: The Movements tab shows stock usage and allocation history.

steps.title: Keep purchases confirmed
steps.body: Stock updates when purchases are confirmed.

payments.title: Payments
payments.summary: Record money received and money paid.

steps.title: Open Payments
steps.body: Go to Daily Work and select Payments.

steps.title: Check receivable and payable
steps.body: The summary cards show money to receive and money to pay.

steps.title: Record a payment
steps.body: Click Record Payment and choose received or paid.

steps.title: Choose payment mode
steps.body: Select Cash, Bank Transfer, UPI, or Cheque.

steps.title: Save reference details
steps.body: Add reference number if available, then save.

reports.title: Reports
reports.summary: Download business summaries as Excel or PDF.

steps.title: Open Reports
steps.body: Go to Money & Reports and select Reports.

steps.title: Choose report type
steps.body: Pick purchase, sales, inventory, profit, ROI, expense, or payment report.

steps.title: Download Excel
steps.body: Use Excel when you want to filter or calculate more.

steps.title: Download PDF
steps.body: Use PDF when you want to share or print.

steps.title: Review regularly
steps.body: Download reports weekly or monthly for business review.

documents.title: Documents
documents.summary: Upload and find bills, invoices, contracts, and files.

steps.title: Open Documents
steps.body: Go to Other and select Documents.

steps.title: Choose entity type
steps.body: Select whether the file belongs to purchase, sale, payment, or another record.

steps.title: Choose file
steps.body: Upload PDF, image, or spreadsheet files.

steps.title: Click Upload
steps.body: The document is saved and listed in the table.

steps.title: Search by file details
steps.body: Use the document list to review uploaded files.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.summary: Understand the main numbers on your home screen.

steps.title: Read the top cards
steps.body: Cards show purchases, sales, profit, stock value, payments, investments, expenses, and assets.

steps.title: Check trends
steps.body: The monthly chart shows how business is changing over time.

steps.title: Review customers and suppliers
steps.body: Top lists help identify important customers and suppliers.

steps.title: Use quick actions
steps.body: Start common tasks directly from the dashboard.

steps.title: Open help
steps.body: Use the guide link when you want a simple walkthrough.

profit-loss.title: Profit & Loss Analytics
profit-loss.summary: Review profit by transaction, FIFO batch, product, and customer.

steps.title: Open Profit & Loss
steps.body: Use the Profit & Money section and open Profit & Loss.

steps.title: Filter the period
steps.body: Select From and To dates, then click Apply.

steps.title: Read transaction margin
steps.body: The transaction tab shows revenue, cost, profit, and margin for each sale.

steps.title: Compare products and customers
steps.body: Use By Product and By Customer to see where the strongest margins come from.

steps.title: Investigate low margin
steps.body: Open sale detail to see which FIFO batches were consumed and how profit was made.

batch-pl.title: FIFO Batch P&L
batch-pl.summary: Understand realized profit as purchase lots are consumed by sales.

steps.title: Confirm purchases first
steps.body: A confirmed purchase creates an inventory batch with cost per unit.

steps.title: Create a sale
steps.body: Sales consume old batches first using FIFO.

steps.title: Review batch tab
steps.body: The FIFO Batches tab shows sold quantity, remaining quantity, realized revenue, and realized profit.

steps.title: Check sale detail
steps.body: A sale view shows the exact batches allocated to each sale line.

steps.title: Use clean margins
steps.body: Taxable revenue is also stored so pre-GST margin can be analyzed separately.

pl-statement.title: P&L Statement
pl-statement.summary: View a Tally-style profit statement for any period.

steps.title: Open P&L Statement
steps.body: Go to Accounting and choose P&L Statement.

steps.title: Choose dates
steps.body: Apply a period filter for month, quarter, or year.

steps.title: Read gross profit
steps.body: Revenue minus COGS shows gross profit from trading.

steps.title: Review expenses
steps.body: Direct and indirect expenses are deducted separately.

steps.title: Check net profit
steps.body: Net profit includes expenses and depreciation.

aging.title: AR/AP Aging
aging.summary: Track receivables and payables by overdue bucket.

steps.title: Open AR/AP Aging
steps.body: Go to Accounting and choose AR/AP Aging.

steps.title: Review buckets
steps.body: Balances are grouped into 0-30, 31-60, 61-90, and 90+ days.

steps.title: Check receivables
steps.body: Receivables show customer money still pending.

steps.title: Check payables
steps.body: Payables show supplier money still due.

steps.title: Follow up
steps.body: Use CRM activities to create follow-up reminders for overdue parties.

day-book.title: Day Book
day-book.summary: Review daily vouchers in one chronological register.

steps.title: Open Day Book
steps.body: Go to Accounting and choose Day Book.

steps.title: Filter dates
steps.body: Select a date range for the voucher period.

steps.title: Review entries
steps.body: Sales, purchases, payments, and expenses appear together.

steps.title: Check debit and credit
steps.body: Amounts are separated into debit and credit columns.

steps.title: Use for daily review
steps.body: Review this page at the end of each business day.

gst-summary.title: GST Summary
gst-summary.summary: Compare output GST from sales with input GST from purchases.

steps.title: Open GST Summary
steps.body: Go to Accounting and choose GST Summary.

steps.title: Choose period
steps.body: Select the return period and apply filters.

steps.title: Read output GST
steps.body: Output GST comes from confirmed sales.

steps.title: Read input GST
steps.body: Input GST comes from confirmed purchases.

steps.title: Check payable
steps.body: Positive payable means tax to pay; negative means available input credit.

leads-pipeline.title: Leads Pipeline
leads-pipeline.summary: Manage opportunities from new lead to won or lost.

steps.title: Open Leads Pipeline
steps.body: Go to CRM and choose Leads Pipeline.

steps.title: Create a lead
steps.body: Add name, company, contact details, source, estimated value, and notes.

steps.title: Set stage
steps.body: Move the lead through New, Contacted, Qualified, Won, or Lost.

steps.title: Review value
steps.body: Each stage shows total estimated value.

steps.title: Plan next step
steps.body: Create activities for calls, meetings, and follow-ups.

activities.title: Activities & Follow-ups
activities.summary: Track calls, emails, meetings, tasks, and reminders.

steps.title: Open Activities
steps.body: Go to CRM and choose Activities.

steps.title: Create activity
steps.body: Choose type, subject, due date, status, and notes.

steps.title: Work from due dates
steps.body: Upcoming and overdue activities help the team follow up on time.

steps.title: Mark completed
steps.body: Set status to Completed when the task is done.

steps.title: Use notifications
steps.body: Overdue activities can create reminder notifications.
